title: anathallis angustilabia
intro: Anathallis angustilabia, commonly known as the Narrow-lipped anathallis, is a species of orchid native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The therapeutic actions of Anathallis angustilabia include soothing and calming effects, which may help in reducing stress and anxiety. However, the exact bioactive constituents responsible for its medicinal properties have not been fully identified, although flavonoids and phenolic compounds are suspected to contribute to its therapeutic actions.
